(srarwr), w\ u, 13*53, ^i-^ros(i) 3 17 fcuH<, 2004^t y+ifeid T&^i *ftTTSTTm^r.fr. 604, fcito 22 RW*┬лR, 2005 W T ^ T T F T O (3romTT^) ^FTi!,^pr5 3, ^-73*^ ( j ) 3 f ^ F 22 fW^TC, 2005 ^ M<b\\k\<\ ^ W *ft I 36I7 (il/2005 ( 0 -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PARITIтАФSnc. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th December. 2005 G.S.R. 121(E).тАФIn exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 9 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs nd Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988) and in supersession of the Notifications of the Government of Ir dia in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) No. G.S.R. 815(E), dated 17th December, 2004 and No. G.S.R. 604(┬г), dated 22nd September, 2005 except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such:superses- sion, the Central povernment hereby constitutes an Advisory Board for a period of one year, consisting of :тАвтАвтАФ Hon'bie Mr. Justice T.S. Thakur Chairman 2. Hon'bie Mr. Justice A.K. Sikri тАФ Member 3. Hon'bie Mr. Justice Pradeep Nandrajog тАФ Member 2. This Notification shall come into force with effect from 19th December, 2005. [F. No. 820/1 l/2003-PITNDPS] K.S.SHARMA, Dy. Secy.
